Title: User Registration
Test Data:
- Username: testuser
- Password: TestPassword123
- Email: testuser@example.com
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter the username, password, and email in the respective fields.
3. Click on the "Register" button.
4. Verify if the user is registered successfully.
Expected Result: The user should be registered successfully and redirected to the login page.

Title: Invalid User Registration
Test Data:
- Username: testuser
- Password: TestPassword
- Email: invalidemail
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter the username, password, and email in the respective fields.
3. Click on the "Register" button.
4. Verify if the registration fails due to invalid email format.
Expected Result: The registration should fail and display an error message indicating an invalid email format.

Title: User Login
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the username and password in the respective fields.
3. Click on the "Login" button.
4. Verify if the user is logged in successfully.
Expected Result: The user should be logged in successfully and redirected to the dashboard.

Title: Invalid User Login
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the username and wrong password in the respective fields.
3. Click on the "Login" button.
4. Verify if the login fails due to incorrect password.
Expected Result: The login should fail and display an error message indicating incorrect credentials.

Title: Event Creation
Test Data:
- Event Name: TestEvent
- Date: 2023-10-10
- Time: 14:00
- Location: TestLocation
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the event creation page.
2. Enter the event name, date, time, and location in the respective fields.
3. Click on the "Create Event" button.
4. Verify if the event is created successfully.
Expected Result: The event should be created successfully and displayed in the list of events.

Title: Invalid Event Creation
Test Data:
- Event Name: TestEvent
- Date: 2023-10-10
- Time: 14:00
- Location: TestLocation
- Missing Date
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the event creation page.
2. Enter the event name, time, and location in the respective fields.
3. Click on the "Create Event" button.
4. Verify if the event creation fails due to missing date.
Expected Result: The event creation should fail and display an error message indicating a required field is missing.

Title: Joining an Event
Preconditions: User is logged in and an event exists.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the event details page.
2. Click on the "Join Event" button.
3. Verify if the user is added to the event attendees list.
Expected Result: The user should be added to the event attendees list and a confirmation message should be displayed.

Title: Viewing an Event
Preconditions: User is logged in and an event exists.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the event details page.
2. Verify if the event details are displayed correctly.
Expected Result: The event details should be displayed correctly including the name, date, time, and location.

Title: User Profile Management
Test Data:
- New Username: NewTestUser
- New Password: NewTestPassword123
- New Email: newtestuser@example.com
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user profile page.
2. Update the username, password, and email in the respective fields.
3. Click on the "Save Changes" button.
4. Verify if the profile information is updated successfully.
Expected Result: The user profile information should be updated successfully and the changes should be reflected in the user's account.

Title: Invalid Profile Update
Test Data:
- New Username: NewTestUser
- New Password: ShortPass
- New Email: invalidemail
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user profile page.
2. Update the username, password, and email in the respective fields.
3. Click on the "Save Changes" button.
4. Verify if the profile update fails due to invalid email format and short password.
Expected Result: The profile update should fail and display error messages indicating an invalid email format and a requirement for a longer password.

Title: Notification Center
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the notification center.
2. Verify if notifications are displayed.
Expected Result: Notifications should be displayed based on the user's activity and system events.

Title: Exit Application
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the exit page.
2. Click on the "Exit" button.
3. Verify if the application exits successfully.
Expected Result: The application should exit successfully and log the user out.

Title: Database Management
Test Steps:
1. Verify if the database connection is established.
2. Perform a simple query to check data integrity.
3. Verify if the query returns expected results.
Expected Result: The database connection should be established successfully and the query should return the expected results.

Title: Newsletter Management
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the newsletter management page.
2. Add a new newsletter with subject and content.
3. Verify if the newsletter is added successfully.
Expected Result: The newsletter should be added successfully and displayed in the list of newsletters.

Title: Invalid Newsletter Management
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the newsletter management page.
2. Attempt to add a newsletter without subject or content.
3. Verify if the newsletter addition fails due to missing required fields.
Expected Result: The newsletter addition should fail and display an error message indicating missing required fields.

Title: Edge Case - Multiple User Registrations
Test Steps:
1. Register multiple users with unique usernames and emails.
2. Verify if all users are registered successfully.
Expected Result: All users should be registered successfully without any conflicts.

Title: Edge Case - Concurrent Event Creation
Test Steps:
1. Simulate concurrent event creations by multiple users.
2. Verify if events are created successfully without conflicts.
Expected Result: Events should be created successfully without any conflicts or errors.

Test Steps:

2. Verify if users can log in successfully without conflicts.
